title: Unit 01s power source
wikitext:
[]: [SPOILERS]Unit-01's power source.             Quote Post by Shinoyami65 » Tue Nov 27, 2012 11:30 am In the original TV series, after defeating and eating Zeruel, Unit-01 gained an S^2 Engine and limitless power, effectively becoming a god. However, in Rebuild, we do not see this happening, but merely know that Eva-01 has unlimited power, allowing it to enter God Mode and serve as the power supply for the AAA Wunder. Even after 14 years it still has enough power to fuel the Wunder and use eye lasers. What I'm wondering is, Unit-01's power coming from? I'm guessing it has an S^2 Engine either due to absorbing Zeruel's core, or generated one while in God Mode, but the specifics of the S^2 and whether Unit-01 now has one aren't really clear in NME.

[]:             Quote Post by Seele00TextOnly » Tue Nov 27, 2012 11:41 am ...

[]:             Quote Post by Shinoyami65 » Tue Nov 27, 2012 11:45 am Seele00TextOnly wrote: In the climax to 2.0, while Shinji is saving Rei, Yui is helping herself to Eva-00's core. We see her pull it from within Zeruel's core, which bursts along with the Angel and reforms into a Large Naked Rei. LNR, being the reformed Eva-00 core itself or at least containing it, merges with Eva-01 to Yui's bidding; we then in the closing shots see Eva-01 now has 2 cores, the S^2 engine.

[]: Re: [SPOILERS]Unit-01's power source.             Quote Post by Eliaskar » Tue Nov 27, 2012 11:49 am Shinoyami65 wrote: In the original TV series, after defeating and eating Zeruel, Unit-01 gained an S^2 Engine and limitless power, effectively becoming a god. However, in Rebuild, we do not see this happening, but merely know that Eva-01 has unlimited power, allowing it to enter God Mode and serve as the power supply for the AAA Wunder. Even after 14 years it still has enough power to fuel the Wunder and use eye lasers. What I'm wondering is, Unit-01's power coming from? I'm guessing it has an S^2 Engine either due to absorbing Zeruel's core, or generated one while in God Mode, but the specifics of the S^2 and whether Unit-01 now has one aren't really clear in NME.

[]:             Quote Post by Seele00TextOnly » Tue Nov 27, 2012 11:55 am ...

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Nov 27, 2012 12:21 pm What happens is that: - Eva-01 pulls Eva-00's core out of 10th Angel - 10th Angel's body bursts into goo and reforms into a giant Rei around Eva-00's core - The giant Rei (= Angel goo + Eva-00 core) merges into Eva-01 - Eva-01 turns into Angel-faced, two-cored* Giant of Light. * (Though upon Spearing, there is no trace of the second core.) We're told as early as the first film (or the 1.11 version, anyway) that Angels have the Fruit of Life. Presumably, Eva-01 acquires this by merging with the Angel's remains. Do note that the term S2 Engine is still absent from NME. How can Eva-01 manifest cool god-powers before absorbing the Angel? Well, it's not as though stuff like this is without precedent or anything. In the original show, Eva-01 gruesomely beats Angels bloody when she's running on absolutely nothing but phlebotinum. Eva-02 gives us a cross-shaped explosion, offensive ATF use, etc., in EoE. And so on.

I'm guessing it has an S^2 Engine either due to absorbing Zeruel's core, or generated one while in God Mode, but the specifics of the S^2 and whether Unit-01 now has one aren't really clear in NME.
